scripts.generate:icons: mkdir -p assets && sips -s format png assets/icon.svg --resampleHeightWidth 16 16 --out assets/icon-16.png >/dev/null && sips -s format png assets/icon.svg --resampleHeightWidth 32 32 --out assets/icon-32.png >/dev/null && sips -s format png assets/icon.svg --resampleHeightWidth 48 48 --out assets/icon-48.png >/dev/null && sips -s format png assets/icon.svg --resampleHeightWidth 128 128 --out assets/icon-128.png >/dev/null
scripts.package:extension: npm run generate:icons && npm run build && rm -rf release && mkdir -p release/extension && cp -R manifest.json dist ui assets README.md release/extension && (cd release && zip -qr ChronoPanel-extension.zip extension)
scripts.check: npm run generate:icons && npm run build && npm run typecheck
